howItWorks.intro: This ev charging cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Charge Cost
rules.explanation: Energy needed accounting for 90% charging efficiency times electric rate.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How much does it cost to charge an EV?
faq.a: Typically $5-15 for a full charge at home, depending on battery size and electricity rate.
Level 1 (120V) adds 3-5 miles/hour. Level 2 (240V) adds 25-30 miles/hour.

howWeCalculate.intro: This ev charging cost calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
